title: Final Sweep & Ship
summary: Final day. Focus on end-to-end verification, edge case fixes, and shippable polish. Test all 15 levels, verify mobile, clean up code, and leave the game in its best possible state.

tasks.description: Verify all 15 levels are solvable — programmatically test that each truth table can be satisfied with the available gates. Fix any issues.
acceptance_criteria: All 15 levels confirmed solvable with available gates

tasks.description: Wire drawing improvement — smoother bezier curve preview during wire drawing instead of right-angle segments. Make wire preview follow mouse with a natural curve.
acceptance_criteria: Wire preview during drawing uses smooth bezier curve
Completed wires still render as L-shaped segments (consistent)

tasks.description: Add a 'How to Play' section accessible from level select — brief illustrated guide explaining the core mechanics (place gates, draw wires, match truth table)
acceptance_criteria: How to Play button on level select
Shows clear instructions with emoji icons
Covers: gate placement, wire drawing, truth table matching, hints

tasks.description: Code cleanup and final polish — review all files for TODOs, unused code, console.logs. Ensure cache-bust versions are consistent. Add a game version number.
acceptance_criteria: No console.logs left in production code
Version number displayed somewhere subtle (e.g., footer)

testing_focus: All features work together (audio, hints, timer, achievements, share)
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced, revert to previous commit
